---
title: "Chimes for the Mothers: A Reading for Each Week in the Year. By Charlotte M. Yonge"
---

## Chimes for the Mothers: A Reading for Each Week in the Year. By Charlotte M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** November 1893
**Genre:** Non-fiction: selection
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London: Wells Gardner, Darton.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
